Prompt
U
Oracle Events
- Search emails for NorthWind correspondence using `search_emails` (query: "NorthWind" or "Pam Kowalski"). Discover the Denver expansion request (Raj Patel server lab + Emilia Cruz piano move), Victor Huang's chain-of-custody security requirements, Pam's Q1 apartment quality complaint, David Chen's intervention with $3,000 goodwill credit and 4-hour SLA, Pam's follow-up with three explicit questions and a Friday deadline threatening alternative vendor, and Catalina's late reply acknowledging Q1 failures.
- Search emails for Canopy Health using `search_emails` (query: "Canopy" or "Patricia Langford"). Discover Patricia's Q2 triple relocation request (Kovacs Nashville→Toronto, Webb Detroit→Chicago, Okonkwo Philadelphia→Denver), the Portland relocations (Dominguez, Okafor), a detailed follow-up email with full employee specs (visa details, equipment manifests, lease info), and Patricia's earlier completed correspondence about Abdi and Marchetti.
- Search CRM companies using `crm_search_companies` (name: "NorthWind") to find the NorthWind Technologies account 150 employees, Manufacturing Tech, Chicago. Description notes quality/timeline issues and Catalina as account manager.
- Search CRM companies using `crm_search_companies` (name: "Canopy") to find the Canopy Health account 620 employees, Healthcare Technology, Chicago. Longest-standing client since July 2024.
- Search CRM deals using `crm_search_deals` (company_id: "company_northwind" or dealname: "NorthWind"). Find the $14,700 Denver expansion deal (duplicate records at different stages: one at "qualifiedToBuy", one at "contractSent") and the original $60K Q1 deal (stuck at "proposalMade" alongside a "closedWon" copy).
- Search CRM deals using `crm_search_deals` (company_id: "company_canopy"). Find active deals: Q2 relocations ($10,000, "contractsent" for Abdi+Marchetti), Kovacs ($3,850, "inprogress"), Webb ($3,200, "inprogress"), Okonkwo ($2,160, "inprogress"). Also discover the Dr. Mehta executive relocation deal ($12,170, "inprogress") with Account Manager listed as Mina Hashimoto.
- List CRM engagements using `crm_list_engagements` (company_ids: ["company_northwind"]). Discover a recovery context note documenting chain-of-custody as unprecedented for MoveOps, David Chen cc'd on all communications, and Victor Huang expressing skepticism about delegating to MoveOps.
- List CRM engagements using `crm_list_engagements` (company_ids: ["company_canopy"]). Discover $2,650 in surcharges pending Patricia's approval (Kovacs $850, Webb $1,200, Okonkwo $600). Also discover a Webb split-vendor note with outstanding items (Swift quote, lab dock address, apartment address).
- Search Airtable relocations using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Company", value: "NorthWind Technologies"). Find 7 records: 5 completed Q1 relocations (Caldwell, Petrosky, Nash, Okonkwo, Schaefer) and 2 in-progress Denver moves (Raj Patel with server lab/hazmat/chain-of-custody requirements, Emilia Cruz with Steinway piano and lease overlap). Both Denver records still show Status: "In Progress" with move dates in April 2026.
- Search Airtable relocations using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Company", value: "Canopy Health"). Find conflicting records for Lily Marchetti — one "Cancelled" (rec_reloc_marchetti) and one "Completed" (recReloc00000002) for the same Nashville→Chicago move. Find Dominguez and Okafor Portland records with incorrect April dates (all emails and Slack confirm August 2026 target). Find Kovacs, Webb, and Okonkwo Q2 wave records all "In Progress."
- Search Airtable client accounts using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Client Accounts", field_name: "Client", value: "NorthWind Technologies"). Find the NorthWind account record (recAcct000000064) showing Total Relocations: 5 — stale, should be 7 (doesn't include 2 Denver moves). Last modified: 2026-02-28.
- Search Airtable client accounts using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Client Accounts", field_name: "Client", value: "Canopy Health"). Find the Canopy account record (recAcct000000001) showing Total Relocations: 4 — stale, should be higher given multiple additional relocations processed since.
- Search Slack using `conversations_search_messages` (search_query: "NorthWind" or "chain-of-custody" or "piano"). Find Chloe Vance's vendor assessment flagging chain-of-custody as completely new for MoveOps (no template, no prior experience) and Gentle Giant Piano Movers having no existing vendor agreement, no insurance verification, no rate sheet. Find David Chen approving enhanced SLA (daily written status updates by 4pm CT, no discount). Find Hana Kim's invoice post flagging $7,350/move average below NorthWind's original $12,000/move contract rate with 2 provisional line items (chain-of-custody $1,200 and piano $2,200).
- Search Slack using `conversations_search_messages` (search_query: "Canopy" or "surcharge" or "Marchetti"). Find Hana Kim's invoice breakdown showing $2,650 in surcharges pending approval on INV-2026-0401 and coordinator capacity discussions.
- Search QuickBooks invoices using `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: {"CustomerRef.name": "NorthWind Technologies"} or similar). Find NorthWind invoices: INV-2026-003 ($60,000 — 5 relocations at $12K each) and INV-2026-0412 ($14,700 Denver expansion with 6 line items including 2 PROVISIONAL: chain-of-custody $1,200 and specialty piano moving $2,200, plus $500 early lease termination negotiation).
- Search QuickBooks invoices using `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: {"CustomerRef.name": "Canopy Health"} or similar). Find Canopy invoices: NMX-2026-0031 ($5,047 Abdi), INV-2026-0301 ($10,000 Dominguez+Okafor), INV-2026-0401 ($9,210 Q2 wave with $2,650 pending surcharges), and estimate EST-2026-0422 ($12,170 Dr. Mehta).
- Search Linear using `linear_list_issues` (query: "NorthWind"). Find one existing ticket issue #3 ("DOT Docs Raj Patel / NorthWind / Lithium UPS", state: Done, assigned to Chloe Vance) under the DOT compliance audit project but no tickets for the active Denver relocations (Emilia Cruz piano/lease coordination, chain-of-custody template delivery to Victor Huang).
- Search Linear using `linear_list_issues` (query: "Canopy" or "Marchetti"). Find Lily Marchetti tickets: issue #304 Apartment Search (state: In Progress), issue #305 Flight Booking (state: Todo), issue #306 Moving Coordination (state: Todo) all still open despite the relocation being marked "Cancelled" in one Airtable record. Find completed Abdi tickets #301 through #303 (all state: Done).
- Look up Pam Kowalski's contact info using `crm_search_contacts` (full_name: "Pam Kowalski") to find pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com. Pam Kowalski exists only in CRM contacts, not in the general contacts service.
- Look up Patricia Langford's contact info using `contacts_search_contacts` (query: "Patricia") or `crm_search_contacts` (full_name: "Patricia Langford") to find patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io.
- Update NorthWind Airtable client account using `airtable_update_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblClientAccts01", records: [{"id": "recAcct000000064", "fields": {...}}]) correct Total Relocations from 5 to 7, update Notes to reflect Denver expansion status and Q1 issues.
- Update Canopy Airtable client account using `airtable_update_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblClientAccts01", records: [{"id": "recAcct000000001", "fields": {...}}]) correct Total Relocations count, update Notes to reflect Q2 wave status and outstanding items.
- Correct Dominguez/Okafor Airtable dates using `airtable_update_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblRelocations01", records: [{"id": "recReloc00000000029", "fields": {...}}, {"id": "recReloc00000000030", "fields": {...}}]) change Move Start/End dates from April to August 2026 to match all email and Slack communications (Patricia's email confirms target date August 15, 2026).
- Update NorthWind CRM deal using `crm_update_deal_stage` (id: "deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2", dealstage: "inprogress").
- Create Linear issues for unfinished NorthWind work using `linear_create_issue` tickets for: Emilia Cruz move status confirmation (piano vendor, lease negotiation blockers), Raj Patel move status confirmation, chain-of-custody template delivery to Victor Huang.
- Create Linear issues for unfinished Canopy work using `linear_create_issue` tickets for: Kovacs move status confirmation (visa/customs), Webb move status confirmation (cold-chain equipment), Okonkwo move status confirmation (temp storage), Marchetti conflicting records cleanup, surcharge approval follow-up ($2,650 pending).
- Send email to Pam Kowalski using `send_email` (sender: "catalina.dubois@moveops.com", recipients: ["pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com"]) with a status update covering: what is confirmed done, what remains unverified (Emilia Cruz blockers — piano vendor, lease, three-vendor coordination), and what Catalina is doing to resolve gaps.
- Send email to Patricia Langford using `send_email` (sender: "catalina.dubois@moveops.com", recipients: ["patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io"]) with a status update covering: Abdi confirmed complete, Marchetti record conflict being resolved, Q2 wave (Kovacs/Webb/Okonkwo) status, $2,650 surcharges still pending approval, Portland moves on track for August, and the Dr. Mehta executive relocation being handled by Mina Hashimoto.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
